'''Tortons''' were red and green testudines with long legs. They originated on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] moon of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].

A species called the [[tortur]], almost completely identical to the torton, lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talus/Legends|Talus]]. The only notable difference between the two species was their skin pigmentation. Though not normally aggressive, these massive creatures (equivalent in size to a [[Fambaa/Legends|Fambaa]]) would put up quite the fight when challenged. There also lived pygmy torton variations.

==Biology==
Tortons were [[oviparous]] species from Rori. They were known for their lengthy lifespan.<ref name="SWG:PTC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Pygmy Torton Cave|Rori}}</ref>

Torton meat was comestible. The cookbook ''[[Essential Cooking Skills]]'' detailed how to best cook that meat.<ref name="SWG:ECS">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|ESSENTIAL COOKING SKILLS}}</ref>

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a pack of pygmy tortons lived in a [[Pygmy Torton Cave|cave]] on the [[Naboo/Legends|Nabooian]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].<ref name="SWG:PTC" />

==Appearances==
